When you claim a pixel for $0.99, you scratch away a digital foil card to uncover a message that no one else in the world will ever receive.

posts.name: AfriX - Family Tree & Legacy
posts.tagline: Preserve the past, empower the future.
posts.description: AfriX is the living archive of human identity for every kind of family — monogamous unions, polygamous unions, multiple parents, clans, and kinship ties that mainstream tools ignore, with names preserved across every script and language. Families worldwide collaboratively map their lineage, record elders' voices, and reconnect across the diaspora in 21 languages. Each family's legacy is anchored on the Bantu blockchain — a verifiable, permanent record for future generations.

posts.name: ViewTikStories
posts.tagline: TikTok Story Viewer and Video Downloader
posts.description: ViewTikStories is an all-in-one browser toolkit for exploring and saving public TikTok content. View and download stories, profile photos, reposts, videos and music, find usernames, and check follower counts from one clean interface. Unlike single-purpose downloaders, it combines multiple everyday TikTok utilities in one place, with no app installation and a simple workflow for creators, marketers, researchers and casual users.

posts.name: AIdometer
posts.tagline: The odometer for your AI — Claude & Codex limits on Mac
posts.description: A tiny macOS menu-bar speedometer for your Claude & OpenAI Codex usage limits. Live session/weekly/monthly windows with reset countdowns, a 90% redline, and an "at this speed you'll run out by Saturday" forecast — so you never hit a surprise "usage limit reached" mid-task again. One-click switch between providers; it reads the CLI logins you already have. 9 themes, 5 layouts, self-updating via GitHub releases. Native Swift, essentially one source file, zero telemetry, MIT licensed.

posts.name: Mother Brain
posts.tagline: Multi-dimensional memory for every app, AI, and human
posts.description: Mother Brain gives AI coding assistants persistent memory. Your AI never forgets — across sessions, projects, and team members. It indexes your entire codebase with 3-layer VMVA semantic vector search, saves every conversation with Total Recall, and connects to Zed, Cursor, VS Code, and any MCP-compatible tool. Ships with embedded PostgreSQL + pgvector — 100% local-first, no cloud required. $25/year. No tiers. No upsells. Beta testers get lifetime access for $25 one-time.
